evals.prompt: Our pytest suite is flat and has a lot of tiny tests. Propose a safe first refactor without breaking existing CI commands.
evals.expected_output: A marker-first taxonomy, preservation of explicit path entrypoints, and a bounded first slice.

evals.prompt: Review these unit tests and identify which ones are low-signal versus contract tests worth keeping.
evals.expected_output: Classification by behavior value, refactor tolerance, and public contract protection.

evals.prompt: Help me reorganize test fixtures for a Python project with repeated dense dictionaries in many tests.
evals.expected_output: A recommendation to introduce explicit factories/builders after real duplication appears, with examples of what to keep local.
